query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.cpu.usage' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, node, avg(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.unix_milli AS unix_milli, s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.node.name') AS node, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.cpu.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.node.cpu.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY time, node ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, node, avg(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.unix_milli AS unix_milli, s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.node.name') AS node, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.node.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY time, node ORDER BY time

panels.title: Top pods by CPU (cores, avg over range)

targets.rawSql: SELECT namespace, pod, round(avg(value),3) AS cpu_cores FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.namespace.name') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.pod.name') AS pod, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY namespace, pod ORDER BY cpu_cores DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top pods by memory (avg over range)

targets.rawSql: SELECT namespace, pod, avg(value) AS mem_bytes FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.namespace.name') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.pod.name') AS pod, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY namespace, pod ORDER BY mem_bytes DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT namespace, pod, container, toUInt64(max(value)) AS restarts FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.namespace.name') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.pod.name') AS pod, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.container.name') AS container, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.container.restarts' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.container.restarts' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY namespace, pod, container HAVING restarts > 0 ORDER BY restarts DESC LIMIT 20
